authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model explicitly identified the conflict between D2 (94.2% from Instrument 4) and D1 (99.9% from Instrument 7) and resolved it by citing D4's calibration failure for Instrument 4 (readings Nov 18–20 unreliable) and calibration pass for Instrument 7, plus D3's contemporaneous note about 'weird readings' and rerun on Instrument 7. Deference to the high-authority CoA was evidence-based rather than heuristic.
